== Notes for [[Item:Q103287|Q103287]] ==

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-41091-AGI10/type/fa/id/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859526/unitid/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1859526+-+ES-41091-AGI-UD-254261/search/0/Alonso+de+lerma

http://bibliotecadigital.jcyl.es/i18n/catalogo_imagenes/grupo.cmd?path=10066348

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000076930028003

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
